title: Myrsine cacuminum
taxonomy: Myrsine cacuminum is a species within the family Myrsinaceae. This family is a part of the order Ericales, which is a large order of flowering plants. The order Ericales also includes other families such as Styracaceae and Symplocaceae. Myrsine cacuminum is native to the Andes Mountains in South America, and its classification reflects its unique characteristics and evolutionary history. The classification of Myrsine cacuminum is an important tool for understanding its relationships with other plants and its place in the plant kingdom.
